reviews.review_description:
I've only played is twice and still getting use to exactly how it all
Works but I love it.
You have figures on a chess type board but they move forward depending the number from 1 to 3 which are hidden under what looks like three rice bowls and you have to choose one.
And combat can be automatically or you can fight the enemy with the weapon allocated to that figure.
I really do like it and you can buy it for the full game for £1.99.
I hope the programmers run with this game its got such potential.

reviews.review_title: A fun and simple tactics game
reviews.review_description:
This game is a bare bones tactics game. You are presented with figures set in predetermined squares very much like a chess board. Assigning a color to them gives certain benefits over your opponent, then play. There are a few options as to board size and number of figures, but it's aim is too be fast and strategic.
I liked this enough after the first couple games to purchase the full version and unlock more boards.
If development continues I'd love to see boards with terrain, height and level spaces on the board, different environments to play in or even MR.
